story.title: OnlyFans Models Are Accidentally Making Hacked Government Websites Disappear
story.summary: Scammers are hijacking government websites to upload ads for “leaked” OnlyFans content. Thousands of copyright complaints from adult creators are helping people avoid malicious links.

points.heading: Models fight stolen content
points.detail: Adult content creators use DMCA takedown requests to combat pirated content across the internet.

points.heading: Hacked government websites impacted
points.detail: DMCA requests target compromised government and university websites due to pirated adult content.

points.heading: Thousands of sites affected
points.detail: Over 2,000 domains across 80 countries received copyright takedown requests linked to adult content creators.

points.heading: Scammers exploit official sites
points.detail: Scammers hijack official .gov and .edu sites to upload malicious pages, using creators' names as lures.
